zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Chateaudun於1227年12月25日出生在法國艾-吉洛易a奧度時，她的父親Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun32歲，母親Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun28歲。她於大約1244年與Jean de Brienne在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a奧-度-洛易結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a奧-度-洛易享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Chateaudun was born on 25 December 1227, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, her father, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, was 32 and her mother, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, was 28. She married Jean de Brienne about 1244, in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1265, in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Chateaudun est née le 25 décembre 1227, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Brienne environ 1244, à Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

Sie hat um 1244 in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Jean de Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1265 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Chateaudun(이)가 1227년 12월 25일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1244년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 cha테오-드-로이르에서 Jean de Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 cha테오-드-로이르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Chateaudun nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1227, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Brienne aproximadamente 1244, em Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1265, em Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Chateaudun родилась 25 декабря 1227 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Brienne около 1244 г. в местности чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Chateaudun nació el 25 de diciembre de 1227, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jean de Brienne aproximadamente 1244, en Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1265, en Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
